passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Reserving this pass will provide you with a code that can be used to purchase tickets at a 50% discount.
The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
source_phrases: Reserving this pass will provide you with a code that can be used to purchase tickets at a 50% discount.
The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
July 15 - September 1: every day
September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays
September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham
June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays
September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person. 
Children under the age of 18 are not included in the admission count and are always admitted free.
Passes are valid only for general admission. They are not applicable toward discounts on special events, shopping, dining, concerts, lectures, or any other public programs.
PATRONS MUST PRESENT BOTH THIS LIBRARY PASS AND THEIR RESERVED TIMED MUSEUM ADMISSION TICKETS FOR ENTRY INTO THE MUSEUM.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
The MassParks Pass entitles the bearer to free parking for one vehicle (excluding buses or vans) at over 50 facilities in the Massachusetts State Parks system that charge a day-use parking fee, with the exception of camping and excluding Quabbin Reservoir, Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots. Check out www.mass.gov/dcr for a full listing of MassParks locations.
Once you have reserved this pass, you may pick it up on the day before OR day of your reservation.
This pass is returnable and must be returned the day of its use, as other patrons may be waiting to use it. Please return to the outside bookdrop.
source_phrases: The MassParks Pass entitles the bearer to free parking for one vehicle (excluding buses or vans) at over 50 facilities in the Massachusetts State Parks system that charge a day-use parking fee, with the exception of camping and excluding Quabbin Reservoir, Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots. Check out www.mass.gov/dcr for a full listing of MassParks locations.
Once you have reserved this pass, you may pick it up on the day before OR day of your reservation.
This pass is returnable and must be returned the day of its use, as other patrons may be waiting to use it. Please return to the outside bookdrop.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Reserving this pass gives you access to a promo code which can be used for discounted admission.
Each promo code provides a discount for:
2 adults at $15 each (general admission & special exhibition)
up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10.
Children age six and younger are free
Patrons who reserve tickets in advance online with the promo code will receive an e-mail with their admission ticket(s) attached and need to present their ticket(s) when they arrive at the Museum, preferably on a phone or device, but tickets printed on paper are accepted.
source_phrases: Reserving this pass gives you access to a promo code which can be used for discounted admission.
Each promo code provides a discount for:
2 adults at $15 each (general admission & special exhibition)
up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10.
Children age six and younger are free

Patrons who reserve tickets in advance online with the promo code will receive an e-mail with their admission ticket(s) attached and need to present their ticket(s) when they arrive at the Museum, preferably on a phone or device, but tickets printed on paper are accepted.
Promo codes and library passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs.
All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.

Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Library ID: 57959
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
source_phrases: Library ID: 57959
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
E-coupon
Pass admits up to five at 50% off
Printed or digital pass MUST be presented at the museum to receive the discount, even if purchased online.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Promo code 
that entitles you to a maximum of two general museum admission tickets at a reduced fee of $12 per person

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass must be picked up at the library.
The Trustees GO Pass:
is valid for admission only; it is not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, inns, campgrounds, special events and programs, on any equipment rental, or in place of any other permits or passes
allows free or reduced admission at the Family Level Membership price at Trustees properties that charge an admission fee
To use with a site that requires timed passes, please enter the promo code (printed on coupon) when securing a timed ticket. See www.thetrustees.org/passes for more details.
Please note: Not every Trustees property charges an admission fee, and some locations require advanced ticketing. For information about the admission at each property, please visit TheTrustees.Org.

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 5 people for free to the USS Constitution Museum.
The USS Constitution Museum and the Ship are operated separately and do not share the same hours of operation. Security procedures are required to visit the Ship, but not the Museum. The Ship's hours and security information are subject to change at any time. Visit USS Constitution’s website for more information on visiting the Ship. Before visiting the USS Constitution Museum, please review their reopening policies here.
source_phrases: Admits up to 5 people for free to the USS Constitution Museum.

The Ship's hours and security information are subject to change at any time. Visit USS Constitution’s website for more information on visiting the Ship. Before visiting the USS Constitution Museum, please review their reopening policies here.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits maximum of 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child. Children under 2 are admitted free.
Valid for general daytime admission to Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo only. Tickets are non-refundable, have no cash value, cannot be combined with other offers or discounts and cannot be replaced if lost or stolen. Not valid for ZooLights or Boston Lights.
